name: Insert Signal Quality Gate Before Filter
intent: Surface unstable or corrupted windows before the main detection path commits to them.
expected_information_flow_effect: Adds a waveform-quality checkpoint ahead of filtering while preserving access to the same source stream.

audit.rationale: Quality-gating lets the framework distinguish detector failure caused by unstable windows from detector failure caused by poor atom choice.
audit.dejargonized_summary: Check whether parts of the signal are too messy before running the main detection pipeline on them.
uncertainty_notes: Windowed quality metrics are heuristic and should not be treated as a universal rejection signal.

references.title: Signal event rate refinement inventory
references.citation: Local transitional family refinement asset for signal-quality gating.
